Ask the OGs

If you a question related to —past or present . One of the OGs will get back to you (etc. etc.)

Browse past responses

2026-03-20

When and where did the Asian American movement start?

The political, historical, and geographical context of the Asian American Movement that led up to its founding with AAPA in Berkeley, 1968 (?)

2026-03-20

What music inspired the Asian American movement?

Jazz and rock-n-roll in the movement.

2026-03-20

How do we stay hopeful when organizing today?

2026-03-20

What did AAPA's community work look like after the TWLF?

The relationship between AAPA and other community organizations and spaces, like the International Hotel (I-Hotel), I Wor Kuen (IWK), the Asian Law Caucus, and Everybody's Bookstore

2026-03-20

What changes did the TWLF strikes lead to at the university?

The beginnings of Ethnic Studies in the Bay Area, as well as Asian Studies at UC Berkeley—a community-centered and student-run academic program established in the early 1970.

2026-03-20

What is the legacy of Gary Okihiro?

2026-03-20

What was the role of martial arts in the Asian American movement?
